FX.title: USD/JPY 155円突破が示す円安・ドル高の到達点―本日のAI解析が示す戦術的エントリー
tldr_points: 円安・ドル高の勢いが再燃

CRYPTO.title: BTC/USD 市場分析
tldr_points: USDC overtakes USDT in card payments
CRYPTO.excerpt: Bitcoin’s technicals align with macro liquidity as ETFs drain $34M first-day volume. Stablecoin shifts to USDC create liquidity divergence. RSI(14) confirms oversold exhaustion. Catalysts for $67k retest imminent.
CRYPTO.comment: MS BT ETF liquidity + USDC dominance convergence. RSI(14) divergence invalidates shorts.
